summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Phase 1 UI features: branded login/start screen, role preset chips, forgot user/pass interaction, owner/management navigation restrictions, workspace theme toggle with persistence, rapid review full-screen mode, crew portal incident toggle, and standards highlights tab. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: Console shows 500 errors for some image URLs (01_cbc42d.jpg) - likely missing or corrupted image files in storage

test_credentials: Used Owner (owner@fieldquality.local / FieldQA123!) and Production Manager (production.manager@fieldquality.local / FieldQA123!) from /app/memory/test_credentials.md
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 validated all Phase 1 UI features: (1) Branded login screen with Sarver logo, grass backdrop animation, role preset chips (Production Manager, Owner, GM), forgot user/pass link with recovery card, (2) Owner navigation shows Overview, Owner Review, Rapid Review, Calibration, Exports, Settings - correctly hides Alignment & QR and Review Queue, (3) Management navigation shows Overview, Alignment & QR, Review Queue, Rapid Review, Settings - correctly hides Owner Review, Calibration, Exports, (4) Navigation restrictions work - Owner redirected from /jobs and /review to /dashboard, Management redirected from /owner, /analytics, /exports to /dashboard, (5) Theme toggle works with persistence across all authenticated pages via localStorage, (6) Rapid Review renders full-screen without normal shell sidebar, has queue strip, bulk selection, action buttons (Fail/Flag/Skip/Pass), annotation controls, keyboard shortcuts, (7) Crew portal has incident toggle that shows/hides issue fields, standards highlights tab with 3 standard cards, shows 'Crew pass active' instead of raw CREWID_ string.

branded_login_screen.role_preset_chips: PASS - Production Manager, Owner, GM all present and functional
branded_login_screen.forgot_user_pass_link: PASS - Shows recovery card on click

owner_navigation_restrictions.visible_nav_items: PASS - Overview, Owner Review, Rapid Review, Calibration, Exports, Settings
owner_navigation_restrictions.hidden_nav_items: PASS - Alignment & QR, Review Queue correctly hidden

management_navigation_restrictions.visible_nav_items: PASS - Overview, Alignment & QR, Review Queue, Rapid Review, Settings
management_navigation_restrictions.hidden_nav_items: PASS - Owner Review, Calibration, Exports correctly hidden

workspace_theme_toggle.persistence_across_pages: PASS - Theme persists when navigating between Overview, Owner Review, Calibration, Settings, Exports

rapid_review_page.full_screen_mode: PASS - Renders without normal shell sidebar
rapid_review_page.queue_strip: PASS - Shows queue items with checkboxes
rapid_review_page.action_buttons: PASS - Fail, Flag, Skip, Pass buttons present
rapid_review_page.theme_toggle: PASS - Theme toggle in rapid review topbar

crew_portal_incident_toggle.toggle_switch: PASS - Present in incident/damage reporting card
crew_portal_incident_toggle.fields_appear_on_toggle: PASS - Issue type, notes, photo upload appear
crew_portal_incident_toggle.fields_hide_on_toggle_off: PASS - Fields hidden when toggled off

crew_portal_standards_tab.tab_present: PASS - Standards highlights tab in tab list
crew_portal_standards_tab.standards_panel: PASS - Panel renders on tab click
crew_portal_standards_tab.standard_cards: PASS - 3 standard cards (Clean bed edge finish, Spring cleanup reset, Tree work clarity)

crew_portal_no_raw_id.crew_id_badge: PASS - Shows 'Crew pass active' instead of raw CREWID_ string
